name: Dede's Buttermilk Bread
recipeIngredient: (for Welbilt/Dak machines add 2 T more buttermilk)
1 1/2 tsp Red Star active dry yeast
recipeInstructions:
Prodigy "research" has shown that if using powdered buttermilk we should omit the baking soda.
Place all ingredients in bread pan, select Light Crust setting, and press Start. From Bread Machine Magic by Linda Rehberg and Lois Conway.
